description.ko: 초디지털 대도시의 잠들지 않는 밤을 위해 설계된 고성능 전기 크루저, NEON-V와 함께 속도와 스타일의 궁극적인 융합을 경험하십시오.
description.en: Experience the ultimate fusion of speed and style with NEON-V, a high-performance electric cruiser designed for the restless nights of a hyper-digital metropolis.

prompt: A cinematic shot of the NEON-V prototype gliding through a rain-soaked, neon-drenched cyberpunk alleyway. Glowing cyan and magenta light strips integrated into the chassis, reflection of digital billboards on the wet asphalt, volumetric fog, high-tech carbon fiber body, futuristic architecture with towering skyscrapers in the background, 8k resolution, photorealistic, motion blur on the wheels.
